body:
Hi Alex Morgan,

The public signals are strong enough to say Vercel may be entering a period where delivery demand rises faster than hiring can absorb. We saw Public Crunchbase and funding search pages did not expose accessible funding detail., and the public hiring picture suggests there may be some growth pressure.

For teams at that stage, Tenacious can help the first 90 days are when vendor mix gets reassessed. One research question worth validating is whether hiring velocity compared with delivery capacity is a current priority or intentionally out of scope.

We can explore likely fit for Python and data engineering support, but detailed staffing commitments should stay with a human Tenacious delivery lead until live bench data is connected. The attached case studies back the pattern if you want a reference point.

If that is directionally true, I can share a short point of view or line up a 30-minute discovery call.
subject: Vercel delivery capacity and hiring pressure
